entry.title: JPG to PDF Converter: The Complete Free Online Guide
entry.summary: A complete SEO-rich guide to converting JPG images to PDF online, including benefits, use cases, safety, FAQs, and troubleshooting.

entry.title: How to Convert JPG to PDF Online for Free
entry.summary: Learn the fastest way to turn JPG and JPEG images into a clean PDF without installing software.

entry.title: How to Merge Multiple JPG Files into One PDF
entry.summary: Learn how to combine many images into one clean, ordered PDF document.

entry.title: JPG vs PDF for Documents: Which Format Should You Use?
entry.summary: Compare JPG and PDF for school assignments, business reports, uploads, and printing.
